first_checks: Check thermostat mode/settings, breaker/disconnect, outdoor unit running, ice buildup, air filter, error codes. Escalate refrigerant/electrical issues to pro.
needed_documents: GSZ14 docs, brand manual, thermostat manual

first_checks: Some frost is normal; heavy ice may mean defrost issue, airflow restriction, low refrigerant, sensor/board issue.
needed_documents: Service manual, wiring diagram, defrost board docs

first_checks: Check batteries if applicable, furnace/air-handler power, float switch, breaker, low-voltage fuse.
needed_documents: Thermostat manual, air handler wiring diagram

first_checks: Check breaker, reset, thermostat, elements; electrical testing is pro-level.
Use exact brand/model error table; check venting, gas supply, water flow, ignition, condensate.
Track entry vs visible stain; inspect flashing, pipe boots, valleys, skylights, vents, nail pops.
Do not keep resetting; possible overload, short, ground fault, failed appliance or breaker.
Check monitoring app, inverter status, shading, dirty panels, breaker/disconnect, grid outage.
Identify brand/model, cartridge/stem, shutoff, exact parts diagram.
Check filter, drain hose high loop/air gap, garbage disposal knockout, pump obstruction. Use exact model manual before disassembly.
Check load balance, lid/door lock, drain issue, error code, belt/direct drive notes by model.
needed_documents: Washer manual and error code chart

first_checks: Check lint restriction, breaker/gas supply, vent blockage; electrical/gas testing is pro-level.
Check condenser coils, door seal, evaporator fan, condenser fan, start relay, error codes.
Check photo eyes/safety sensors, door balance, travel limits, force settings, obstruction.
Check battery, fuel supply, exercise schedule, error code, oil level, transfer switch status.
Check power/GFCI, float switch, pit debris, check valve, discharge freezing/clogging.
